name: HWR_SAVED_SEARCH_B
description: The SAVED_SEARCH table is used to store SavedSearches for a user for a screen or a report.

columns.Name: SEARCH_ID
columns.Comments: This is the primary key for the SAVED_SEARCH tables. The number should be generated from the sequence.

columns.Name: SEARCH_OWNER
columns.Comments: The user name of the owner of this SavedSearch object. It can be null for seeded data.

columns.Name: COMPONENT_KEY
columns.Comments: This string key identifies the use of this SavedSearch.

columns.Name: SEARCH_MODE
columns.Comments: The search mode for this SavedSearch, identifies a basic (1) or advanced (2) search. A 0 value means that search mode is not known.

columns.Name: FILTER
columns.Comments: The XML serialized CompositeFilter for this SavedSearch.

columns.Name: SEARCH_ORDER
columns.Comments: The XML serialized OrderInfo for this SavedSearch.

columns.Name: IS_AUTO_RUN
columns.Comments: A flag indicating that this saved search is to be executed automatically by the UI. Use Y for true or N for false.

columns.Name: IS_DEFAULT
columns.Comments: A flag indicating that this saved search is the default for this user and component key. Use Y for true or N for false.

columns.Name: IS_HIDDEN
columns.Comments: A flag indicating that this saved search is to be hidden from the user. Use Y for true or N for false.

columns.Name: IS_SEEDED_DATA
columns.Comments: A flag indicating seeded data. Use Y for seeded data or N for customer data.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.
